items.title: It's finally out!!!
items.description: It's finally out!!! @METR_Evals found that more than half of SWEBench results is unmergeable slop. FrontierCode represents over 1000+ hours of maintainer validated software engineering work most frontier models cannot yet solve, much less…

items.title: The new killer NotebookLM feature: easily being able to expand your search beyond your ow…
items.title_zh: 新的杀手级 NotebookLM 功能：能够轻松地将您的搜索范围扩展到您现有的范围之外......
items.description: The new killer NotebookLM feature: easily being able to expand your search beyond your own source files Then, with today's update, you can also make new output formats: PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, charts, etc. We want NotebookLM to keep helpin…
items.description_zh: 新的杀手级 NotebookLM 功能：轻松地将搜索扩展到自己的源文件之外然后，通过今天的更新，您还可以创建新的输出格式：PDF、DOCX、XLSX、PPTX、图表等。我们希望 NotebookLM 继续提供帮助……

items.title: When we first demoed Claude Code internally, it got two reactions on Slack.
items.title_zh: 当我们第一次在内部演示 Claude Code 时，它​​在 Slack 上得到了两种反应。
items.description: When we first demoed Claude Code internally, it got two reactions on Slack. A year after GA, @_catwu and I sat down to talk about what's changed: why I use auto mode instead of plan mode, how routines fix bugs before I see them, why I do m…
items.description_zh: 当我们第一次在内部演示 Claude Code 时，它​​在 Slack 上得到了两种反应。 GA 一年后，@_catwu 和我坐下来讨论发生了什么变化：为什么我使用自动模式而不是计划模式，例程如何在看到错误之前修复它们，为什么我这样做……

items.title: There’s no amount of intelligence that can get packed into AI models that replaces the ne…

items.description: There’s no amount of intelligence that can get packed into AI models that replaces the need for context. For any sufficiently general purpose AI, you will always have to guide it in the direction you want as it has an infinite range of dir…
